flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Wor-Wic Community College are 17% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($36.7k vs $44.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Wor-Wic Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Wor-Wic Community College rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (54.4% → 66.5%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Wor-Wic Community College fell 18% between 2017 and 2020 ($9.5k → $7.8k).
